headline: Guy's Chair Has 'Become Sentient,' Now Charges Him Rent For Sitting In It
summary: The chair demands payment in snacks and 'respectful sitting posture.'
fullBody: Jake McChair's chair has become sentient and is demanding rent. 'It wants snacks and better posture,' Jake said. 'It says I sit 'too aggressively.'' Jake has been forced to negotiate. 'I offered it a cushion,' Jake said. 'It wasn't enough.' The chair is now a 'landlord.' Jake is looking for a new chair.
